@@ -408,7 +408,119 @@ final class AppControllerTests: XCTestCase {
 
         await controller.start()
 
-        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .error("Accessibility permission is required for hotkey monitoring."))
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .error("Accessibility access required -- grant permission then click Retry"))
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStartWithDeniedMicrophoneStopsBeforeBootstrappingRuntime() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let pasteTargetMonitor = AppControllerPasteTargetMonitor()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            pasteTargetMonitor: pasteTargetMonitor,
+            microphonePermission: AppControllerMicrophonePermission(accessGranted: false)
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .error("Microphone access required"))
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startedBindings, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(pasteTargetMonitor.startCallCount, 0)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStartWithDeniedInputMonitoringOpensSettingsButContinuesStarting() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let inputMonitoring = AppControllerInputMonitoringPermission(isGranted: false, requestResult: false)
+        let systemSettings = AppControllerSystemSettingsOpener()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            inputMonitoringPermission: inputMonitoring,
+            systemSettingsOpener: systemSettings
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(inputMonitoring.requestAccessCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(systemSettings.openedPanes, [.inputMonitoring])
+        XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startedBindings, [.defaultBindings])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStartRefreshesScreenRecordingStateWithoutBlockingStartup() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let screenRecording = AppControllerScreenRecordingPermission(initialState: .denied)
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            screenRecordingPermission: screenRecording
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(screenRecording.refreshCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startedBindings, [.defaultBindings])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testRetryRecoveryRequestsInputMonitoringAndReturnsReady() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        hotkeyMonitor.startErrorSequence = [HotkeyMonitorError.eventTapUnavailable, nil]
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let inputMonitoring = AppControllerInputMonitoringPermission(isGranted: false, requestResult: true)
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            inputMonitoringPermission: inputMonitoring
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .error("The hotkey monitor could not be started."))
+
+        controller.performRecoveryAction(.retryInputMonitoring)
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.status == .ready
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(inputMonitoring.requestAccessCallCount, 2)
+        XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startedBindings, [.defaultBindings])
+        XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startInvocationCount, 2)
     }
 
     @MainActor
@@ -460,10 +572,19 @@ private final class AppControllerSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {
 private final class AppControllerHotkeyMonitor: HotkeyMonitoring {
     private(set) var startedBindings: [HotkeyBindings] = []
     var startError: Error?
+    var startErrorSequence: [Error?] = []
     var isRunning = false
+    private(set) var startInvocationCount = 0
     private var effectHandler: HotkeyEffectHandler?
 
     func start(bindings: HotkeyBindings, effectHandler: @escaping HotkeyEffectHandler) throws {
+        startInvocationCount += 1
+        if !startErrorSequence.isEmpty {
+            let nextError = startErrorSequence.removeFirst()
+            if let nextError {
+                throw nextError
+            }
+        }
         if let startError {
             throw startError
         }
@@ -491,6 +612,81 @@ private final class AppControllerHotkeyMonitor: HotkeyMonitoring {
     }
 }
 
+private final class AppControllerPasteTargetMonitor: PasteTargetMonitoring, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var currentObservation: PasteTargetObservation?
+    private(set) var startCallCount = 0
+
+    func start() {
+        startCallCount += 1
+    }
+
+    func synchronize(to application: FrontmostApplicationContext?) {
+        _ = application
+    }
+
+    func record(_ observation: PasteTargetObservation) {
+        currentObservation = observation
+    }
+
+    func clearObservation() {
+        currentObservation = nil
+    }
+}
+
+private struct AppControllerMicrophonePermission: MicrophonePermissionControlling {
+    let accessGranted: Bool
+
+    func ensureAccess() async -> Bool {
+        accessGranted
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerInputMonitoringPermission: InputMonitoringPermissionControlling, @unchecked Sendable {
+    private let granted: Bool
+    private let requestResult: Bool
+    private(set) var requestAccessCallCount = 0
+
+    init(isGranted granted: Bool, requestResult: Bool) {
+        self.granted = granted
+        self.requestResult = requestResult
+    }
+
+    func isGranted() -> Bool {
+        granted
+    }
+
+    func requestAccess() -> Bool {
+        requestAccessCallCount += 1
+        return requestResult
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerScreenRecordingPermission: ScreenRecordingPermissionControlling, @unchecked Sendable {
+    private(set) var state: ScreenRecordingPermissionState
+    private(set) var refreshCallCount = 0
+
+    init(initialState: ScreenRecordingPermissionState) {
+        state = initialState
+    }
+
+    func refresh() -> ScreenRecordingPermissionState {
+        refreshCallCount += 1
+        return state
+    }
+
+    func requestAccess() -> ScreenRecordingPermissionState {
+        state
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerSystemSettingsOpener: SystemSettingsOpening, @unchecked Sendable {
+    private(set) var openedPanes: [SystemSettingsPane] = []
+
+    func open(_ pane: SystemSettingsPane) {
+        openedPanes.append(pane)
+    }
+}
+
 private final class AppControllerAudioRecorder: AudioRecording, @unchecked Sendable {
     var isRecording = false
     var startCallCount = 0
